login.title: Partner Login
login.subtitle: Access your partner dashboard
login.legalPrefix: Mu gufyonda kuri continue, wemeye ko

register.title: Gushiraho konte
register.subtitle: Andika ido n'ido ryawe kugira utangure
register.legalPrefix: Mu gufyonda kuri continue, wemeye ko
register.successMessage: Murakoze kwiyandikisha. Kugira ngo ushobore gukora konte yawe, raba email yawe hanyuma ukande kuri link yo kugenzura twakurungikiye.
register.passwordTooShort: Ijambo ry'ibanga ritegerezwa kuba rifise n'imiburiburi inyuguti 6

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Andika imwe muri kode zawe zo gukiza kugira wiyandikishe
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Please enter a valid recovery code (format: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Ufise ingorane? Contact support for help.

setup.subtitle: Reka tugutegure. Hitamwo ubwoko bwa konte yawe kugira ubandanye.
setup.clinicDescription: Ndi umuvuzi canke umuvuzi w'amagara y'abantu hamwe n'abaganga benshi
setup.labDescription: Ndafise imashini ikora ibipimo canke imashini ikora ibipimo
setup.individualDescription: Ndi umuhinga mu vy'amagara y'abantu canke umushakashatsi ku giti cabo
setup.setupError: Yananiwe kurangiza itegurwa. Please try again.

messages.errorFallback: Yananiwe kurungika email yo gusubiramwo. Please try again.

success.title: Raba email yawe
success.sentTo: Twarungitse link yo kugarukana ijambo ry'ibanga kuri {{email}}
success.description: Raba inbox yawe hanyuma ukurikize amabwiriza kugira usubire gukoresha ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe. Urupapuro rw'inzira ruzorangira mu isaha 1.

form.title: Mwibagiwe ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe?
form.description: Andika email yawe hanyuma tuzokurungikira umurongo wo gusubiramwo.

messages.errorFallback: Yananiwe gusubiza ijambo ry'ibanga (password). coba cari di coba cari lagi.

form.title: Subiramwo ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe
form.description: Andika ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe rishasha hepfo.

messages.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Ndakwinginze ukoreshe link ya email yawe.
messages.errorFallback: Yananiwe kwemeza email yiwe. coba cari di coba cari lagi.

state.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...
state.errorDescription: Ntitwashoboye kuronka aderesi ya email yawe.

success.nextStep: Ubu urashobora kwinjira muri konte yawe ukoresheje email yawe hamwe n'ijambo ry'ibanga (password).

error.helpText: Mu gihe ivyo bibandanya gutyo, hamagara abafasha canke usubire kwiyandikisha.
